name: Monster Breeding RPG
description:
Forge your own adventure with the might of the mating press.

Features

  • Inbuilt stat-system for all characters, aswell as option to check stats and information.

  • To use this system simply go out of character and ask the bot directly

  • Inbuilt impregantion notification for further gamification (Can be removed).

  • Generates random encounters as well as contracts.

There's no starting message. You start with your own, be it isekai style or you're a new breeder starting out your farm. Go ham, bro.
creator: KusanagiRyu
